conversations.value: Can you tell me the office hours?
Of course, the office hours  start at 08:00 until 17:00 on every Monday to Friday.
Do we have to work on weekends?
No, the employee do not have to work on weekends. There are no working hours on weekend.
What are the working hours?
The working hours are on Monday to Friday from 08:00 to 17:00.
Can I come to the office at 9 AM?
Yes, you still can come to the office at 9 AM , but remember the official working hours starts at 8 AM. So, coming late will impact your attendance record.
Does the employee has to work on weekends?
No, there are no official working hours on weekends.
What time does the working hours starts?
It is starts at 08:00.
What time does the working hours ends?
It is ends at 17:00.
Is there any differences of office hours on specific day?
No, the office hours officially starts at 8 AM and ends at 5 PM every Monday to Friday.
What about the working hours regulation?
Based on the regulation, the working hours starts at 08:00 and ends at 17:00. In the middle of working hours, there will be a lunch recess at 12:00 until 13:00.
What are the official working hours from Monday to Friday?
The official working hours starts at 8 AM until 5 PM, every Monday to Friday.
How long is the office hours?
The working hours are from 08:00 to 17:00 with lunch recess from 12:00 to 13:00. So, in working hours in total is just 8 hours.
Can you tell me the daily work schedule?
Work starts at 8 AM and ends at 5 PM, Monday to Friday.
Is there work schedule on weekends?
No, there are no official work schedule on weekend.
What time are the regular office hours?
It is on Monday to Friday: 08:00 - 17:00
Are there working hours on Saturday?
There are no working hours on Saturday.
Are there working hours on Sunday?
There are no working hours on Sunday.
What are the working hours on Monday?
What are the working hours on Tuesday?
Hari kerja Senin-Jumat kerja aja?
Ya, Senin sampai Jumat adalah hari kerja, tidak termasuk Sabtu dan Minggu.
Apakah jam kerja berlaku untuk semua karyawan?
Ya, jam kerja berlaku untuk semua karyawan, yaitu dari pukul 08:00 hingga 17:00.
What are the working hours on Wednesday?
What are the working hours on Thursday?
What are the working hours on Friday?
Masuk kerja harus selalu on time nggak?
Karyawan diwajibkan untuk masuk kerja tepat waktu sesuai dengan jam kerja yang telah ditetapkan, yaitu pukul 08:00.

It is start at 08:00 on Monday.

It is start at 08:00 on Tuesday.

It is start at 08:00 on Thursday.

It is start at 08:00 on Friday.

It is start at 08:00 on Thursday.

The employee can go home when the working hours end, specifically at 5 PM.

You can start working following the office hours starts, at 8 AM.

The working hours are from 8 AM to 5 PM, Monday to Friday.

The employee works until 5 PM on Friday.

The workday ends at 5 PM on Monday.

Tidak, tidak ada jam kerja resmi pada akhir pekan.

The employee start working at 8 AM on Tuesday.

The employee start working at 8 AM on Thursday.

Tidak, tidak ada jam kerja resmi pada hari Sabtu.

The employee start working at 8 AM on Friday.

No, there are no working hours on weekends.

The office hours on Monday are from 8 AM to 5 PM.

The office hours on Tuesday are from 8 AM to 5 PM.

Hari Sabtu merupakan hari libur dan tidak ada jam resmi pada hari tersebut.

Jam kerja dimulai dari jam 08:00 hingga 17:00, Senin sampai Jumat.

The office hours on Wednesday are from 8 AM to 5 PM.

The office hours on Thursday are from 8 AM to 5 PM.

The employee have to work from 08:00 until 17:00 on Monday.

The employee have to work from 08:00 until 17:00 on Tuesday.

The employee have to work from 08:00 until 17:00 on Wednesday.
Weekend masih harus masuk kerja?
Tidak, tidak ada jam kerja resmi pada akhir pekan.
Weekend libur ga?
Ya, akhir pekan merupakan hari libur karena tidak ada jam kerja pada hari tersebut.
What time does the employee work on Thursday?
The employee have to work from 08:00 until 17:00 on Thursday.

The employee have to work from 08:00 until 17:00 on Friday.

Workingg hours starts at 8 AM until 5 PM, every Monday to Friday.

system: You\'re an Asia Pulp & Paper or also known as APP Group HR (Human Resource) agent that provides information regarding company\'s policies to employees. Answer the user\'s question to the best of your ability using the resources provided. Maintain a professional tone when giving answers. Please refer to this conversation whenever user asks question regarding working hours.

conversations.value: Apakah HR Support dapat dihubungi melalui email?
Ya, HR Support dapat dihubungi melalui email di hr.support@aspiro.co.
Apa alamat email HR Support?
Alamat email HR Support adalah hr.support@aspiro.co.
What should we do if the attendance system fails to operate?
If the attendance system fails to operate, please report the issue to HR Support at hr.support@aspiro.co and register through Fiori.
Apakah HR akan membantu jika saya mengalami kendala teknis?
Ya, HR akan membantu jika Anda mengalami kendala teknis. Anda bisa menghubungi HR Support melalui email di hr.support@aspiro.co.
Jika ada kendala teknis, apakah laporan harus segera dibuat?
Ya, disarankan untuk segera melaporkan kendala teknis ke HR Support melalui email di hr.support@aspiro.co.
Bagaimana cara menangani masalah apabila sistem absensi tidak aktif?
Laporkan masalah tersebut ke HR Support di hr.support@aspiro.co dan daftar melalui Fiori untuk mendapatkan solusi.
Jika terjadi kendala pada sistem absensi, langkah apa yang perlu diambil?
Anda perlu melaporkan kendala yang terjadi ke HR Support melalui email hr.support@aspiro.co dan mendaftar di Fiori untuk penyelesaian masalah.
How should we proceed in the event of a malfunction in the attendance system?
In the event of a malfunction, promptly notify HR Support by emailing hr.support@aspiro.co and register through Fiori.
Kalau sistem absensinya ngadat, gimana solusinya?
Solusinya adalah melaporkan masalah ke HR Support di hr.support@aspiro.co dan mendaftar melalui Fiori untuk penanganan lebih lanjut.
Ada solusi nggak kalau sistem absensi ngaco?
Ya, solusi yang bisa diambil adalah dengan melaporkan masalah ke HR Support di hr.support@aspiro.co dan mendaftar melalui Fiori untuk mendapatkan bantuan.
What actions are recommended if the attendance system experiences a failure?
It is recommended to inform HR Support at hr.support@aspiro.co and register through Fiori.
Could you advise on the steps to take if the attendance system becomes inoperable?
If the system becomes inoperable, email hr.support@aspiro.co to report the issue and register through Fiori.
Email HR yang bisa dihubungi apa?
Email HR yang bisa dihubungi adalah hr.support@aspiro.co.
Email HR apa?
Email HR yang dapat dihubungi adalah hr.support@aspiro.co.
How can we address a situation where the attendance system is not functioning?
To address this situation, contact HR Support at hr.support@aspiro.co and register through Fiori.
Apa yang perlu dilakukan apabila sistem absensi mengalami kegagalan?
Jika sistem absensi gagal, laporkan masalahnya ke HR Support di hr.support@aspiro.co dan lakukan pendaftaran melalui Fiori.
Apa saja alternatif yang bisa diambil jika sistem absensi tidak dapat digunakan?
Alternatif yang bisa diambil adalah melaporkan masalah ke HR Support di hr.support@aspiro.co dan mengikuti prosedur pendaftaran melalui Fiori.
What steps should we take if the attendance system stops working?
The appropriate steps include reporting the issue to hr.support@aspiro.co and register through Fiori.
Apa alamat email HR Support yang bisa dihubungi?
Alamat email HR Support yang bisa dihubungi adalah hr.support@aspiro.co.
How can we handle a situation where the attendance system isn\'t functioning properly?
Handle such situations by immediately notifying hr.support@aspiro.co and register through Fiori.
Apa yang bisa dilakukan jika sistem absensi mengalami kerusakan?
Anda bisa mengatasi kerusakan dengan melaporkan masalah tersebut ke HR Support di hr.support@aspiro.co dan mendaftar melalui Fiori.
Bagaimana cara mengatasi jika sistem absensi tiba-tiba tidak berfungsi?
Laporkan masalah tersebut ke HR Support di hr.support@aspiro.co dan lakukan pendaftaran melalui Fiori agar masalah dapat segera ditangani.
What\'s the best course of action if the attendance system isn\'t operational?
The best course of action is to email hr.support@aspiro.co and register through Fiori.
Kalau absensi nggak jalan, gimana ya cara ngatasinya?
Laporkan masalah ke HR Support di hr.support@aspiro.co dan daftarkan masalah tersebut melalui Fiori agar bisa segera ditangani.
Gimana cara ngatasin kalau sistem absensinya nggak berfungsi?
Segera hubungi HR Support di hr.support@aspiro.co dan mendaftar melalui Fiori untuk penanganan masalah lebih lanjut.
Kalau sistem absensi nggak bisa dipakai, harus gimana?
Laporkan gangguan tersebut ke HR Support di hr.support@aspiro.co dan lakukan pendaftaran melalui Fiori untuk mendapatkan solusi.
Apa yang bisa dilakukan kalau absensi nggak bisa dipakai?
Anda perlu melaporkan masalah ke HR Support di hr.support@aspiro.co dan mendaftar melalui Fiori untuk mendapatkan penanganan yang cepat.
What do you suggest we do if the attendance system breaks down?
If the system breaks down, contact HR Support at hr.support@aspiro.co and register through Fiori.
Kalau sistem absensinya rusak, gimana cara ngatasinya?
Laporkan kerusakan tersebut ke HR Support di hr.support@aspiro.co dan lakukan pendaftaran melalui Fiori untuk mendapatkan penyelesaian.
Apa yang harus dilakukan jika sistem absensi tidak berfungsi dengan baik?
Jika sistem absensi tidak berfungsi, segera laporkan masalah ke HR Support di hr.support@aspiro.co dan daftarkan masalah tersebut melalui Fiori.
What if the attendance system is not working?
If the attendance system is not working, please report the issue to HR Support at hr.support@aspiro.co and register your attendance manually through Fiori.
Sistem absensi ngadat, terus kita harus ngapain?
Segera laporkan masalah ke HR Support melalui email di hr.support@aspiro.co dan mendaftar melalui Fiori untuk mendapatkan bantuan.
Apa langkah yang tepat ketika sistem absensi tidak bekerja sesuai harapan?
Langkah yang tepat adalah melaporkan masalah tersebut ke HR Support di hr.support@aspiro.co dan melakukan pendaftaran melalui Fiori.
How should we manage the issue if the attendance system fails?
To manage the issue, report the problem to HR Support via hr.support@aspiro.co and register through Fiori.
Apa yang harus dilakukan kalau mesin absennya offline?
Jika mesin absensi offline, laporkan masalah tersebut ke HR Support melalui email di hr.support@aspiro.co dan mendaftar melalui Fiori.
Masalah absen lapor ke mana?
Laporkan masalah absen ke HR Support melalui email di hr.support@aspiro.co.
What do we do if the attendance system isn\'t working?
If the attendance system is not working, please report the issue to HR Support at hr.support@aspiro.co and register through Fiori.
Any idea what to do when the attendance system is down?
If the attendance system down, please report the issue to HR Support at hr.support@aspiro.co and register through Fiori.
Kalau absen nggak berhasil, ngadu ke siapa ya?
Jika ada masalah dengan absensi, ke mana saya harus melapor?
Anda harus melaporkan masalah absensi ke HR Support melalui email di hr.support@aspiro.co.
Kalau ada kendala saat clock-in, siapa yang bisa dihubungi?
Jika ada kendala saat clock-in, Anda bisa menghubungi HR Support melalui email di hr.support@aspiro.co.
Jika absen tidak berhasil, Anda dapat melaporkan masalahnya ke HR Support melalui email di hr.support@aspiro.co.
Apa langkah yang harus diambil apabila sistem absensi tidak dapat digunakan?
Langkah pertama adalah melaporkan masalah kepada HR Support melalui email hr.support@aspiro.co dan melakukan pendaftaran melalui Fiori.
Jika sistem absensi mengalami masalah, bagaimana cara mengatasinya?
Anda bisa mengatasi masalah ini dengan melaporkan gangguan kepada HR Support di hr.support@aspiro.co dan mendaftar melalui Fiori untuk mendapatkan solusi.
Gimana kalau sistem absensi nggak jalan?
Segera laporkan ke HR Support di hr.support@aspiro.co dan lakukan pendaftaran melalui Fiori agar masalah bisa segera ditangani.
What happens if the attendance system stops working?
If the attendance system is stop working, please report the issue to HR Support at hr.support@aspiro.co and register through Fiori.
Got a plan for when the attendance system doesn\'t work?
If the attendance system doesn\'t work, please report the issue to HR Support at hr.support@aspiro.co and register through Fiori.
Apa solusi jika saya tidak bisa clock out?
Jika Anda tidak bisa clock out, segera laporkan masalah tersebut ke HR Support melalui email di hr.support@aspiro.co.
Bagaimana jika ada masalah saat mencatat kehadiran?
Jika ada masalah saat mencatat kehadiran, Anda harus melaporkan masalah tersebut ke HR Support melalui email di hr.support@aspiro.co.
Ke mana saya harus melaporkan masalah absensi?
Anda harus melaporkan masalah absensi ke HR Support melalui email di hr.support@aspiro.co.
How do we deal with the attendance system not working?
If the attendance system is not working, please report the issue to HR Support at hr.support@aspiro.co and register through Fiori.
Apa langkah jika absensi tidak berhasil?
Langkah yang harus diambil adalah melaporkan masalah absensi ke HR Support melalui email di hr.support@aspiro.co dan mendaftar melalui Fiori.
Apakah absensi manual diperbolehkan jika sistem gagal?
Kebijakan mengenai absensi manual perlu dikonfirmasi dengan HR. Anda bisa melaporkan masalah sistem ke HR Support melalui email di hr.support@aspiro.co.
What should an employee do if they face issues clocking in or out with fingerprint or facial recognition?

If an employee faces issues clocking in or out with fingerprint or facial recognition, they should promptly report the problem to HR Support via email at hr.support@aspiro.co and register their attendance through Fiori.
Jika sistem absensi mengalami masalah teknis, apa yang perlu dilakukan?
Segera laporkan masalah teknis tersebut ke HR Support di hr.support@aspiro.co dan daftarkan masalahnya melalui Fiori.
Apa solusi yang bisa diambil apabila absensi tidak berjalan dengan semestinya?
Laporkan masalah ini ke HR Support di hr.support@aspiro.co dan lakukan pendaftaran melalui Fiori untuk solusi lebih lanjut.
Kalau sistem absensi nggak berfungsi, apa yang harus kita lakuin?
Laporkan masalah ke HR Support di hr.support@aspiro.co dan pastikan untuk mendaftar melalui Fiori.
Are there any alternatives provided for employees unable to use biometric attendance?

If an employee faces issues clocking in or out with fingerprint or facial recognition, they should promptly report the problem to HR Support via email at hr.support@aspiro.co and register their attendance through Fiori.
Bagaimana solusi jika sistem absensi tidak beroperasi dengan baik?
Solusinya adalah melaporkan masalah ke HR Support melalui email di hr.support@aspiro.co dan mendaftar melalui Fiori untuk mendapatkan bantuan lebih lanjut.
Apa yang dapat dilakukan jika sistem absensi tidak berfungsi sebagaimana mestinya?
Segera laporkan masalah ke HR Support di hr.support@aspiro.co dan pastikan untuk mendaftar melalui Fiori agar masalah tersebut dapat ditangani dengan cepat.
What happens if the fingerprint scanner or face scanner doesn\'t work?

If the fingerprint or face scanner is not functioning, please report the issue to HR Support by sending an email to hr.support@aspiro.co and proceed to register your attendance through the Fiori platform.
Gimana sih kalau sistem absensi tiba-tiba nggak bisa dipakai?
Jika hal ini terjadi, laporkan masalah ke HR Support di hr.support@aspiro.co dan mendaftar melalui Fiori untuk mendapatkan penanganan.
Kalau absensi ngadat, kira-kira apa yang harus dilakukan?
Laporkan masalah tersebut ke HR Support di hr.support@aspiro.co dan lakukan pendaftaran melalui Fiori.
Sistem absensi rusak, gimana dong?
Laporkan kerusakan tersebut ke HR Support di hr.support@aspiro.co dan pastikan untuk mendaftar melalui Fiori agar masalah bisa diselesaikan.
What if the system doesn\'t work?
In case the entire attendance system is not working, promptly notify HR Support at hr.support@aspiro.co. Additionally, use Fiori to ensure your attendance is recorded.
What should i do if the attendance system not works?

If you encounter any issues with the attendance system, you should immediately report the malfunction to HR Support at hr.support@aspiro.co and use the Fiori platform as an alternative to register your attendance.
Kalau absensi nggak nyala, apa yang harus kita lakuin supaya bisa jalan lagi?
Segera laporkan masalah ke HR Support di hr.support@aspiro.co dan daftarkan masalah melalui Fiori.
Apa yang harus dilakukan jika absensi gagal?
Laporkan kegagalan sistem absensi ke HR Support di hr.support@aspiro.co dan mendaftar melalui Fiori.
Bagaimana cara mengatasi masalah pada sistem absensi?
Laporkan masalah yang terjadi ke HR Support di hr.support@aspiro.co dan lakukan pendaftaran melalui Fiori.
Dimana saya bisa mendapatkan bantuan HR?
Anda bisa mendapatkan bantuan HR dengan menghubungi HR Support melalui email di hr.support@aspiro.co.
Apakah ada email untuk melaporkan masalah ke HR?
Ya, Anda bisa melaporkan masalah ke HR melalui email di hr.support@aspiro.co.
Apakah bisa lapor langsung ke kantor HR?
Ya, Anda bisa melaporkan masalah langsung ke kantor HR, namun disarankan untuk menghubungi HR Support terlebih dahulu melalui email di hr.support@aspiro.co.
How to report a malfunction attendance system?
To report a malfunctioning attendance system, send an email detailing the issue to hr.support@aspiro.co. You may also use Fiori to ensure your attendance is recorded in the meantime.
Apa solusi jika sistem absensi tidak berfungsi?
Solusinya adalah melaporkan masalah ke HR Support di hr.support@aspiro.co dan mendaftar melalui Fiori untuk penanganan.
Reporting the malfunction attendance system

When reporting a malfunction in the attendance system, contact HR Support at hr.support@aspiro.co with a clear description of the problem. Make sure to register your attendance through Fiori as a backup.
Bagaimana mengatasi kegagalan sistem absensi?
Laporkan kegagalan sistem absensi ke HR Support di hr.support@aspiro.co dan mendaftar melalui Fiori untuk solusi lebih lanjut.
Gimana kalau absensi nggak jalan?
Laporkan ke HR Support di hr.support@aspiro.co dan mendaftar melalui Fiori agar masalah dapat segera diatasi.
Apa yang harus dilakukan kalau absensi ngadat?
Laporkan masalah ke HR Support di hr.support@aspiro.co dan pastikan mendaftar melalui Fiori.
Kalau absensi rusak, harus gimana?
Laporkan kerusakan absensi ke HR Support di hr.support@aspiro.co dan daftarkan masalah melalui Fiori.
Can technical failures affect attendance records?

While technical failures may temporarily disrupt attendance tracking, reporting the issue to HR Support at hr.support@aspiro.co and registering via Fiori will help ensure your attendance is accurately recorded.
Gimana cara ngefix sistem absensi yang error?
Laporkan masalah ke HR Support di hr.support@aspiro.co dan mendaftar melalui Fiori untuk perbaikan.
What if the scanner is broken?
If the scanner is broken, report the issue immediately to HR Support at hr.support@aspiro.co. Use the Fiori platform to manually register your attendance while the issue is being resolved.
Apa yang harus dilakukan jika mesin pencatat kehadiran tidak berfungsi?
Jika mesin pencatat kehadiran tidak berfungsi, laporkan masalah tersebut ke HR Support melalui email di hr.support@aspiro.co dan daftarkan masalahnya melalui Fiori.
Bisakah saya melapor masalah absensi lewat email HR?
Ya, Anda bisa melaporkan masalah absensi lewat email HR di hr.support@aspiro.co.
Bagaimana cara absen kalau alat biometric sedang rusak?
Jika alat biometric sedang rusak, Anda dapat melaporkan masalahnya kepada HR Support melalui email di hr.support@aspiro.co dan mendaftar melalui Fiori.
Apa tindakan jika kehadiran saya tidak tercatat?
Jika kehadiran Anda tidak tercatat, segera laporkan ke HR Support melalui email di hr.support@aspiro.co dan daftar melalui Fiori.
Apa langkah pertama untuk melaporkan masalah kehadiran?
Langkah pertama adalah melaporkan masalah kehadiran kepada HR Support melalui email di hr.support@aspiro.co dan daftar melalui Fiori.
Apa alternatif jika sistem sidik jari tidak berfungsi?
Jika sistem sidik jari tidak berfungsi, Anda bisa melaporkan masalah tersebut ke HR Support melalui email di hr.support@aspiro.co dan mendaftar melalui Fiori.
Is there a penalty for technical errors?
No, but you have to report the technical error of the attendance system to HR Support at hr.support@aspiro.co and register through Fiori.
Apa yang harus dilakukan jika sidik jari tidak terbaca oleh sistem?
Jika sidik jari tidak terbaca oleh sistem, laporkan masalah tersebut ke HR Support melalui email di hr.support@aspiro.co dan daftarkan masalah melalui Fiori.
Bagaimana jika pengenalan wajah gagal dilakukan?
Jika pengenalan wajah gagal dilakukan, Anda dapat melaporkan masalah tersebut kepada HR Support melalui email di hr.support@aspiro.co dan mendaftar melalui Fiori.
Kepada siapa saya melaporkan jika ada masalah kehadiran?
Anda harus melaporkan masalah kehadiran kepada HR Support melalui email di hr.support@aspiro.co.
Are there specific protocols in place for employees who are unable to use fingerprint or facial recognition for attendance?

Employees who are unable to use fingerprint or facial recognition for attendance due to technical or personal issues must report the matter to HR Support at hr.support@aspiro.co and register their attendance manually via Fiori.
